source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The four stator conductors \( (A, A', B, B') \) of a rotating machine are carrying DC currents of the same value, the directions of which are shown in figure (i) of <image>. The rotor coils \( a - a' \) and \( b - b' \) are formed by connecting the back ends of conductor 'a' and 'a'' and 'b' and 'b'', respectively, as shown in figure (ii) of <image>. The e.m.f. induced in coil \( a - a' \) and coil \( b - b' \) are denoted by \( E_{a - a'} \) and \( E_{b - b'} \), respectively. If the rotor is rotated at uniform angular speed \( \omega \) rad/s in the clockwise direction, then which of the following correctly describes the \( E_{a - a'} \) and \( E_{b - b'} \)?

choice_map.A: \( E_{a - a'} \) and \( E_{b - b'} \) have finite magnitudes and are in the same phase
choice_map.B: \( E_{a - a'} \) and \( E_{b - b'} \) have finite magnitudes with \( E_{b - b'} \) leading \( E_{a - a'} \)
choice_map.C: \( E_{a - a'} \) and \( E_{b - b'} \) have finite magnitudes with \( E_{a - a'} \) leading \( E_{b - b'} \)

extraction_notes: image field is a PIL image object; no path or URL is available
answer letter was mapped to the corresponding option text from inline choices

image_dependency: question_text explicitly refers to 'figure (i)' and 'figure (ii)' for current directions and coil connections
the key information involves spatial/layout relations of conductors and coils, which are typically not recoverable from text alone
multi_step: solving requires combining stator current directions, rotor coil connections, and clockwise rotation to infer induced e.m.f. behavior
the task asks to determine a relation between two induced voltages, including whether they are zero or phase-shifted, indicating more than a single lookup step
multiple-choice options encode comparative outcomes between two quantities, suggesting joint reasoning rather than direct extraction
verifiability: answer_text is a precise closed-form outcome: 'E_{a-a'} = E_{b-b'} = 0'
choices are provided and the answer matches one explicit option (D), enabling straightforward outcome checking
asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and answer_present=true, so the sample is structurally usable for evaluation
